/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnav_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libnav_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/nav_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/nav_interfaces/msg/detail/bot_pose__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vboxuser/ros_ws/build/nav_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libnav_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
